goal: Route v0 release blocker recertification operator actions to the verified external CUDA training launcher before the lower-level CUDA training handoff.
head: 49f9504
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update v0 release blocker recertification next-action routing to the verified launcher, focused tests, refreshed current NOT_GO artifacts, LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD only.
required_evidence: Recertification primary_external_handoff points to artifacts/review/verified_external_cuda_training_launcher.sh when training/setup blockers exist.
operator_next_actions names the verified launcher before lower-level training or RC handoff paths.
Focused tests verify current NOT_GO and child-command failure routing to the verified launcher.
Refreshed recertification remains NOT_GO with no M6-RC/v0 release GO claim.
warnings: The current host still lacks real trained adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence.
This gate improves operator routing only; it does not run CUDA training, accept evidence, or relax readiness.

phase_notes.plan: Route recertification next actions to the verified launcher so operators cannot skip packet verification before training handoff execution.
phase_notes.audit: Current recertification still names the lower-level CUDA training handoff as the primary external action even though a verified launcher now exists.
phase_notes.build: Patch recertification routing, focused tests, refreshed current NOT_GO artifacts, docs/CONTEXT.md, docs/WORKING.md, completion log, and PABCD.
phase_notes.check: Run focused tests, py_compile, current NOT_GO recertification, JSON validation, search evidence, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this verified-launcher routing phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Recertification next-action routing to verified launcher, focused tests, refreshed current NOT_GO artifacts, LLM context/working state, completion log, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
